item.title: Houthi missiles strike VLCC in Red Sea, vessel ablaze
item.description: Two Houthi-fired anti-ship missiles struck a Suezmax tanker transiting the southern Red Sea. Bridge ablaze, crew evacuated; cargo status unknown.

item.title: OPEC+ agrees production cut of 1M bpd
item.description: OPEC+ ministers agreed to a 1 million barrels per day production cut at their emergency meeting.
